opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: Ruined couch → showroom-clean for $47 (pet hair gone in 60 sec)
opportunities.before_state: Stained, pet-hair-covered sofa with visible wear and zero water protection
opportunities.after_state: Sleek, waterproof-protected sofa that looks brand new and wipes clean instantly
opportunities.why_now: Flood watch surging at 50K+ searches today spikes waterproof-home anxiety, layered on top of peak June pet-shedding season driving couch cover demand.

opportunities.specific_product: Under-bed rolling storage drawers with lid set of 2
opportunities.transformation_hook: Bare dorm chaos → Pinterest bedroom for $35 before move-in
opportunities.before_state: Standard-issue empty dorm room with zero storage, clutter on the floor, no personality
opportunities.after_state: Colorful, organized bedroom maximizing every inch with hidden under-bed storage
opportunities.why_now: Apartment Therapy is actively publishing IKEA college bedroom content now and June is peak dorm-shopping season with move-in dates 8 weeks out.

opportunities.specific_product: Midea 20-pint portable dehumidifier with continuous drain hose
opportunities.transformation_hook: Damp musty basement → dry clean storage room for $89
opportunities.before_state: Wet, musty-smelling basement or laundry room with visible moisture and mold risk on walls
opportunities.after_state: Dry, odor-free space safe for long-term storage and comfortable year-round use
opportunities.why_now: Flood watch searches broke 50K today, pushing homeowners into real-time moisture-control and flood-prep purchase mode.

opportunities.specific_product: Brightech Ambience Pro waterproof LED outdoor string lights 48ft
opportunities.transformation_hook: Dark bare patio → festive July 4th party space for $42
opportunities.before_state: Plain unlit backyard with no ambiance, zero setup for evening outdoor entertaining
opportunities.after_state: Warm-glowing Americana-decorated outdoor space fully ready for a July 4th cookout crowd
opportunities.why_now: HGTV published 3+ July 4th outdoor entertaining pins today and Independence Day is 17 days out, the tightest purchase window of the summer.

opportunities.specific_product: InnoGear 500ml ultrasonic essential oil diffuser with timer
opportunities.transformation_hook: Embarrassing home smell → spa-fresh every room for $28
opportunities.before_state: Home that smells stale or like pets despite regular cleaning, dreading summer guests
opportunities.after_state: Every room carries a consistent fresh scent that guests comment on immediately
buyer_intent_keywords: how to make home smell good
opportunities.why_now: Real Simple ran two separate home-smell pins today, signaling strong editorial push on this pain point heading into summer guest and hosting season.
